onem.label: NEO — National Employment Office
onem.description: The administration responsible for unemployment regulations and the eC3.2 application in Belgium.

derogationsSection.title: Derogations
derogationsSection.subtitle: The exceptions and deferrals provided during the transition period to the eC3.2.
derogationsSection.transitionNote: A derogation request could be extended once if necessary up to 30 June 2025 at the latest. From 1 July 2025, all temporarily unemployed workers must use the eC3.2, except JC 327. (These rules may change — to be checked before final publication.)

cp327.title: JC 327 exception
cp327.summary: The webinar mentions a permanent derogation for JC 327. This information must be checked before any final publication and can be edited in the builder.

worker.title: Temporary derogation requested by the worker
worker.summary: The worker informs the employer via a notification form; the employer signs for receipt or the worker sends a registered letter; then a request to the NEO and to their payment institution.

conditions.2: Maximum period of three consecutive months between January 2025 and June 2025
conditions.3: The worker must not yet have used the eC3.2

employer.title: Temporary derogation requested by the employer
employer.summary: The employer submits the request to the NEO. If approved: workers already on eC3.2 continue; the others can temporarily continue with the paper card, can start the eC3.2 at any time, and must use it after the end of the derogation period.

conditions.2: Maximum period of three consecutive months between January 2025 and June 2025

obligation.title: Obligation from 1 January 2025
obligation.intro: Since 1 January 2025, the electronic control card eC3.2 has become the rule for temporary unemployment. Here is what changes concretely for workers and employers.

workers.0: Being in order during a check relies on a correctly filled electronic card
workers.1: Work must be indicated before it starts
workers.2: The card must be filled in from the first effective unemployment day of the month
workers.3: In the construction sector, it must always be filled in
workers.4: Payment is based on the electronic card

employers.0: No longer issue paper cards except by derogation
employers.1: No longer fill in the validation book except for workers still receiving a paper card

why.title: Why the eC3.2?
why.subtitle: The advanced benefits for the transition from paper to electronic card.

items.1: The NEO is informed when the card is filled in
items.2: Better traceability of what is filled in and when
items.6: Digital transmission to the payment institution
items.9: End of certain lengthy paper procedures
items.10: Available in NL, FR and DE

why.note: The eC3.2 aims to facilitate faster processing. (Docbel does not guarantee faster payment.)

help.title: Need help?

body.0: If you have a login problem in the real application, the webinar mentions the social security contact centre.
body.1: If you have a problem using the application, contact your payment institution.
body.2: If you cannot fill in the card on time, inform the NEO so that you are in order during a check.

help.disclaimer: Docbel helps you understand the procedure, but does not replace the NEO or your payment institution.

legal.noTransmission: No data is transmitted to the NEO
legal.notReplacement: This page does not replace the official eC3.2 application
legal.useOfficial: To submit a real request, use the official eC3.2 application

builderMetadata.lastReviewedNote: Educational content based on a NEO webinar — to be checked before final publication (notably JC 327 and derogations).

all-month.title: I am on temporary unemployment for the whole month
all-month.context: Your employer has placed you on temporary unemployment for the whole month. No working days, no other situation to report.
all-month.objective: Understand that « Unemployment » is the default situation: for a day actually on temporary unemployment, nothing needs to be changed.
all-month.expectedAction: Do not change anything for the days actually on unemployment, unless another situation applies.
all-month.feedbackCorrect: Correct: if you are on temporary unemployment that day, the default situation is enough.
all-month.feedbackError: Not quite: for a day actually on unemployment, the default situation already fits. No need to add another situation.

work-own.title: I work one day at my employer
work-own.context: You are on temporary unemployment for several days, but on Wednesday you work at the employer who placed you on unemployment.
work-own.objective: Be able to report an occasional return to work at the employer who fills the card.
work-own.expectedAction: Select the day concerned and choose « Work at the employer ».
work-own.feedbackCorrect: Correct: work at the regular employer must be indicated before starting.
work-own.feedbackError: Not quite: a day worked at your employer is not an unemployment day. Select the day and choose « Work at the employer ».

work-elsewhere-usual.title: I do a flexi-job on a day I normally work
work-elsewhere-usual.context: During your temporary unemployment, you perform work elsewhere (for example a flexi-job) on a day you normally work at your regular employer.
work-elsewhere-usual.objective: Distinguish work performed elsewhere on a day normally worked at the regular employer.
work-elsewhere-usual.expectedAction: Choose « Work elsewhere — day normally worked at the regular employer ».
work-elsewhere-usual.feedbackCorrect: Correct: work elsewhere on a normally worked day must be indicated.
work-elsewhere-usual.feedbackError: Not quite: since this day is normally worked at your regular employer, choose « Work elsewhere — day normally worked at the regular employer ».

work-elsewhere-weekend.title: I work on Saturday at another employer
work-elsewhere-weekend.context: You do not normally work on Saturday at your regular employer, but that day you do occasional work elsewhere.
work-elsewhere-weekend.objective: Understand that work elsewhere must also be reported on a normally non-worked day, such as in the weekend.
work-elsewhere-weekend.expectedAction: Choose « Work elsewhere — normally non-worked day ».
work-elsewhere-weekend.feedbackCorrect: Correct: even in the weekend, work elsewhere must be indicated.
work-elsewhere-weekend.feedbackError: Not quite: work performed on a normally non-worked Saturday must still be reported. Choose « Work elsewhere — normally non-worked day ».

other-regular.title: I have two part-time jobs
other-regular.context: You combine two regular part-time jobs and one of them places you on temporary unemployment, while the other continues normally.
other-regular.objective: Be able to report the continuation of another regular employment during temporary unemployment.
other-regular.expectedAction: Choose « Work at another regular employer ».
other-regular.feedbackCorrect: Correct: if you combine several regular jobs, the other occupation must be communicated to the payment institution.
other-regular.feedbackError: Not quite: your second regular job continues. Choose « Work at another regular employer » and inform the payment institution.

sick.title: I become sick during the temporary unemployment
sick.context: During a period of temporary unemployment, you become sick for a few days and are unfit for work.
sick.objective: Be able to indicate the sickness days as work incapacity and remember to inform the health insurance fund.
sick.expectedAction: Select the sickness days and choose « Work incapacity ».
sick.feedbackCorrect: Correct: sickness, work accident or maternity rest must be indicated as work incapacity. The health insurance fund must be informed within 48 hours.
sick.feedbackError: Not quite: a sickness day is not an unemployment day. Select the days concerned, choose « Work incapacity » and inform your health insurance fund within 48 hours.

vacation.title: I take holidays
vacation.context: During your temporary unemployment period, you take a few days of annual holidays.
vacation.objective: Be able to distinguish holiday days from temporary unemployment days.
vacation.expectedAction: Choose « Holidays » for the days concerned.
vacation.feedbackCorrect: Correct: individual or collective annual holidays must be indicated.
vacation.feedbackError: Not quite: a holiday day is not an unemployment day. Choose « Holidays » for the days concerned.

other-situation.title: I have a public holiday or paid training
other-situation.context: During your temporary unemployment, a day is covered by another situation: for example a public holiday or paid training.
other-situation.objective: Understand when to use « Other situation » for a day without performance but otherwise covered.
other-situation.feedbackCorrect: Correct: certain days without performance but covered by another situation must be indicated as another situation.
other-situation.feedbackError: Not quite: a public holiday or paid training is not an unemployment day. Choose « Other situation ».

multiple-employers.title: I am on temporary unemployment at two employers
multiple-employers.context: Two of your employers place you on temporary unemployment during the same month. A single card is not enough.
multiple-employers.objective: Understand that a separate card must be filled in for each employer concerned.
multiple-employers.expectedAction: Fill in two fictitious cards, one per employer concerned.
multiple-employers.feedbackCorrect: Correct: when there is temporary unemployment at several employers, a card must be filled in for each employer concerned.
multiple-employers.feedbackError: Not quite: a single card does not cover two employers. Fill in a separate card for each employer who placed you on unemployment.

no-payment-org.title: I am not yet affiliated with a payment institution
no-payment-org.context: You fill in your card, but you are not yet affiliated with a payment institution (HVW/CAPAC, ACV/CSC, ABVV/FGTB or SYNOVA).
no-payment-org.objective: Understand that the card can be filled in without affiliation but cannot be submitted.
no-payment-org.expectedAction: Fill in the card but observe that submission is blocked.
no-payment-org.feedbackCorrect: Correct: without affiliation with a payment institution, the card can be filled in but cannot be submitted.
no-payment-org.feedbackError: Not quite: without a payment institution, submission remains blocked. You can fill in the card, but affiliation is needed to submit it.

correction.title: I forgot to indicate work
correction.context: You notice that a working day has been recorded as unemployment. The card has not yet been submitted: a correction is possible.
correction.objective: Be able to correct a wrongly entered day and provide the requested explanation before saving.
correction.expectedAction: Modify the day concerned, choose the right situation, provide an explanation.
correction.feedbackCorrect: Correct: a correction must be explained before being saved.
correction.feedbackError: Not quite: a correction cannot be saved without an explanation. Select the day, choose the right situation and justify the modification.

construction-cp124.title: I work in construction
construction-cp124.context: You fall under joint committee 124 (construction) and your employer places you on temporary unemployment.
construction-cp124.objective: Understand the rule specific to the construction sector: the card must always be filled in for the employer concerned.
construction-cp124.expectedAction: Understand that the card must always be filled in for the employer in the construction sector.
construction-cp124.feedbackCorrect: Correct: in JC 124, the card must always be filled in for the employer concerned.
construction-cp124.feedbackError: Not quite: in construction (JC 124), the card must always be filled in for the employer concerned, without exception.

first-effective-day.title: I start temporary unemployment during the month
first-effective-day.context: Your temporary unemployment does not start on the 1st of the month but during the month. The first effective day is reported automatically.
first-effective-day.objective: Know from which day the card must be filled in when the unemployment starts during the month.
first-effective-day.expectedAction: Fill in the card from the first effective unemployment day to the end of the month.
first-effective-day.feedbackCorrect: Correct: the card must be filled in from the first effective unemployment day of the month.
first-effective-day.feedbackError: Not quite: the card is filled in from the first effective unemployment day, not from the 1st of the month. Continue until the last day of the month.

wrong-month.title: I chose the wrong first month
wrong-month.context: You realise that an earlier month should have been declared and activated first. A new simulated declaration is needed.
wrong-month.objective: Understand that an earlier month can be activated if necessary, via a new declaration.
wrong-month.expectedAction: Select an earlier month and accept a new simulated declaration.
wrong-month.feedbackCorrect: Correct: an earlier month can be activated if necessary.
wrong-month.feedbackError: Not quite: if the wrong month was activated, select the earlier month concerned and accept the new simulated declaration.

temporary_unemployment.label: Temporary unemployment
temporary_unemployment.description: Default situation. You do not need to indicate anything if you are actually on temporary unemployment that day.
temporary_unemployment.warning: If you work elsewhere during these days, you must indicate it.
temporary_unemployment.helpDetail: By default, all the calendar cells are already on « Unemployment ». You therefore do not need to enter anything for these days: simply modify only the days that correspond to another situation (work, incapacity, holidays, etc.).

examples.0: Days when you are temporarily unemployed
examples.1: Days without work due to time credit or career break
examples.2: Days when you do not usually work at this employer (certain weekends, usual inactivity days)

work_own_employer.label: Work at the employer
work_own_employer.description: To choose when you work at the employer for whom you fill in the card. Also to indicate if this work is performed in the weekend or on a usual inactivity day at this employer.
work_own_employer.warning: Work must be recorded BEFORE starting to work.
work_own_employer.helpDetail: For night work, indicate the day on which the activity begins. Night work is a performance between 8 PM and 6 AM. If the performance counts more hours than a normal working day, two cells must be indicated.

examples.0: Day worked at the employer who fills the card
examples.1: Work in the weekend at this employer
examples.2: Work on a usual inactivity day at this employer

work_elsewhere_usual_day.label: Work elsewhere — day normally worked
work_elsewhere_usual_day.description: To choose when you work elsewhere on a day you normally work for the regular employer.
work_elsewhere_usual_day.warning: To be recorded before starting to work.
work_elsewhere_usual_day.helpDetail: Exceptions: the secondary activity within the Springboard for the self-employed measure does not need to be mentioned; for arts workers (chapter XII), certain own, secondary or occasional unpaid activities do not need to be mentioned.

examples.5: Secondary activity accepted by the NEO between 7 AM and 6 PM

work_elsewhere_non_usual_day.label: Work elsewhere — day normally non-worked
work_elsewhere_non_usual_day.description: To choose when you work elsewhere on a day you do not normally work for the regular employer.
work_elsewhere_non_usual_day.warning: To be recorded before starting to work.
work_elsewhere_non_usual_day.helpDetail: Exceptions: the secondary activity within the Springboard for the self-employed measure does not need to be mentioned; for arts workers (chapter XII), certain own, secondary or occasional unpaid activities do not need to be mentioned.

examples.7: Secondary activity accepted by the NEO, regardless of the time

work_other_regular_employer.label: Work at another regular employer
work_other_regular_employer.description: You combine two long-term part-time jobs. This case concerns neither a flexi-job nor a self-employed activity.
work_other_regular_employer.warning: To be recorded before starting to work.
work_other_regular_employer.helpDetail: You must inform your payment institution of this other occupation.

examples.1: Combination of two regular part-time occupations

incapacity.label: Work incapacity
incapacity.description: To choose in case of sickness, work accident or maternity rest. Also include Saturdays, Sundays and public holidays if these days are part of the incapacity period.
incapacity.warning: Inform your health insurance fund within 48 hours.
incapacity.helpDetail: Indicate « Work incapacity » for the entire period concerned, including the non-worked days (weekends and public holidays) that fall within this period.

vacation.label: Holidays
vacation.description: To choose for days of individual annual holidays or during a collective closure for annual holidays, whether the days are covered by holiday pay or not.
vacation.helpDetail: Medical force majeure: in case of progressive part-time resumption authorised by the medical adviser, also indicate « Holidays » for the holiday days taken. Extra-legal leave does not necessarily have to be exhausted during the collective closure; if it is, indicate it as « Other situation ».

other.label: Other situation
other.description: To choose for days without performance but covered by another situation.

examples.3: Day covered by compensation for dismissal
examples.8: Extra-legal leave during a collective closure for annual holidays

not_applicable.label: Not applicable
not_applicable.description: Greyed cells: days on which you are not bound by an employment contract with the chosen employer (contract started or ended during the month), and days outside the selected month.
not_applicable.helpDetail: You cannot enter these days. This situation is assigned automatically, you have nothing to do.

examples.0: Days before the start of the contract in the month
examples.1: Days after the end of the contract in the month

first_effective_unemployment_day.label: First effective unemployment day
first_effective_unemployment_day.description: First unemployment day of the month for the selected employer, as communicated by the employer to the NEO. Appears in case of temporary unemployment for economic reasons, bad weather or technical accident. For other types, no icon is shown.
first_effective_unemployment_day.warning: Fill in the card from the first effective unemployment day to the end of the month. For construction, the card must always be filled in.
first_effective_unemployment_day.helpDetail: The absence of this icon during the first month of use does not block the operation of the card. This situation is reported automatically, you have nothing to enter.

login.title: Simulated login
login.intro: Choose an identification method to understand how the login works. Here, nothing is requested and no real login takes place.

declaration.title: Sworn declaration — simulation
declaration.intro: At the first official login, you choose the start month, read the manual and the conditions, then confirm that you are switching to the electronic channel.
declaration.monthField: Month from which I use the eC3.2
declaration.checkbox: I confirm that I have read the manual and the conditions, and from now on use the electronic channel (fictitious checkbox).

employer.title: Choose the employer
employer.intro: Choose the employer who placed you on temporary unemployment. Your other occupations will be indicated on this card.

month.title: Choose the month
month.intro: Select the card of the month to be filled in. Already-submitted cards are locked.

card.title: Control card — simulation
card.affiliation: I am affiliated with a payment institution

selector.title: Which situation for this/these day(s)?
selector.workElsewhereGroup: Work elsewhere than at the employer

calendar.selectHint: Click on a day to select it. Click again to remove it.

verify.title: Verify the card
verify.intro: Review your entries before the simulated submission. Check especially the days worked and the incapacity days.

list.empty: No days to display for this month.

login.eid: The eID is your electronic identity card. In the real application, you use it with a card reader and your PIN code to identify yourself securely.
login.itsme: itsme is a mobile digital identity application. In the real application, you confirm your identity on your smartphone, without a card reader.
login.frontalier: Cross-border workers with a national register number or a BIS number can use an electronic identification method recognised at European level (eIDAS). If this is not possible, an alternative digital key can be activated after contact with the NEO.
login.noMeans: Without an electronic identification method, you can contact the NEO to activate an alternative digital key. This simulation itself does not request any identification.

declaration.monthImportance: In the real application, the choice of month is important: it determines from when you use the eC3.2.

month.rule: The eC3.2 card is accessible only for the previous month. In June → only May is available. From 1 July, May disappears and June becomes accessible in turn.
month.activatePast: If you activated the eC3.2 from a given month but you were already on temporary unemployment before, you can activate an earlier month. A new sworn declaration is then requested.
month.cards: For each employer, you see the card of the current month, that of the next month, the unsubmitted cards of previous months, and the unused cards for months without temporary unemployment.

calendar.defaultChomage: By default, the calendar cells are considered as « Unemployment ». You do not need to indicate anything if you are actually on temporary unemployment that day. If you work elsewhere, you must indicate it.
calendar.notApplicable: The greyed cells (« Not applicable ») concern days without a contract with the chosen employer (contract started or ended during the month) and days outside the selected month.
calendar.firstEffectiveDay: The first effective unemployment day of the month is reported automatically (economic unemployment, bad weather or technical accident). For other types of temporary unemployment, no icon is shown.
calendar.firstSendNoIcon: The absence of this icon during the first month of use does not block the operation of the card.
calendar.fillUntilEnd: The card must be filled in from the first effective unemployment day to the last day of the month. In construction, the card must always be filled in.

save.unsaved: Your changes are not saved. Save before continuing.

send.firstSendBefore: Submission is not yet possible: the first possible submission date has not been reached. Even when this date falls before the end of the month, the card must be filled in correctly until the last day of the month. (This simulation never sends anything.)
send.noPaymentOrg: In the real application, you can fill in the card, but you must be affiliated with a payment institution (HVW/CAPAC, ACV/CSC, ABVV/FGTB or SYNOVA) to be able to send it.
send.notNeeded: If you do not request benefits, submission is not necessary. If you wish to request benefits, affiliation with a payment institution is required.

correction.help: In the real application, a clear explanation helps inspectors to understand the modification. Only unsubmitted cards can be corrected; the NEO is informed of the modifications.
correction.locked: This card has been submitted and is locked in the simulation. A submitted card can no longer be modified.

work.beforeStart: All work must be recorded before starting to work.

confondre-ec32-et-ec3.title: Confusing eC3.2 and eC3
confondre-ec32-et-ec3.explanation: The eC3.2 concerns temporary unemployment, while the eC3 concerns full unemployment. The two cards are not used in the same situation.
confondre-ec32-et-ec3.advice: Check your situation before starting: if you are on temporary unemployment, the eC3.2 is indeed the one to fill in.

croire-simulation-officielle.title: Believing that the Docbel simulation is a real official request
croire-simulation-officielle.explanation: The Docbel simulator is only intended for understanding and practising. No data is sent and nothing is transmitted to the NEO.
croire-simulation-officielle.advice: For a real request, use the official eC3.2 application. The simulator remains a learning tool.

oublier-indiquer-travail-avant.title: Forgetting to indicate work before starting
oublier-indiquer-travail-avant.explanation: Work performed during temporary unemployment must be indicated on the card before starting to work, not after.
oublier-indiquer-travail-avant.advice: Get into the habit of entering the workday as soon as you know you are going to work, before the performance.

attendre-fin-du-mois.title: Waiting until the end of the month to fill everything in
attendre-fin-du-mois.explanation: Deferring the filling in to the end of the month risks forgetting days or particular situations.
attendre-fin-du-mois.advice: Fill in the card as the days go by, as soon as a situation arises, so that you forget nothing.

choisir-mauvais-employeur.title: Choosing the wrong employer
choisir-mauvais-employeur.explanation: The card must be filled in for the employer who actually placed you on temporary unemployment.
choisir-mauvais-employeur.advice: Carefully select the employer concerned; in case of doubt, check which employer reported the temporary unemployment.

ne-pas-mentionner-autre-travail.title: Not mentioning other work
ne-pas-mentionner-autre-travail.explanation: Work performed elsewhere during temporary unemployment must always be reported on the card, even if it concerns another employer.
ne-pas-mentionner-autre-travail.advice: Indicate each day worked elsewhere with the « Work elsewhere » situation appropriate to the day concerned.

oublier-de-sauvegarder.title: Forgetting to save
oublier-de-sauvegarder.explanation: A situation entered but not saved risks not being taken into account on the card.
oublier-de-sauvegarder.advice: After each modification, check that your changes have been properly saved before leaving.

croire-carte-envoyee-modifiable.title: Believing that a submitted card can be freely modified
croire-carte-envoyee-modifiable.explanation: Once the card has been submitted, it is locked: it can no longer be freely modified.
croire-carte-envoyee-modifiable.advice: Carefully check each day before submitting; corrections are only possible as long as the card has not been submitted.

corriger-sans-explication.title: Correcting without explanation
corriger-sans-explication.explanation: A correction may require an explanation. Without justification, the modification cannot be saved.
corriger-sans-explication.advice: When you correct a day, take the time to provide a clear explanation of the modification.

pas-inscrit-organisme-paiement.title: Not being affiliated with a payment institution
pas-inscrit-organisme-paiement.explanation: Without affiliation with a payment institution (HVW/CAPAC, ACV/CSC, ABVV/FGTB or SYNOVA), the card can be filled in but cannot be submitted.
pas-inscrit-organisme-paiement.advice: Affiliate yourself with a payment institution as soon as possible to be able to submit your card and receive your benefits.

oublier-jours-maladie.title: Forgetting sickness days
oublier-jours-maladie.explanation: Sickness days are not unemployment days: they must be indicated as work incapacity.
oublier-jours-maladie.advice: Select the days concerned, choose « Work incapacity » and inform your health insurance fund within 48 hours.

oublier-vacances.title: Forgetting holidays
oublier-vacances.explanation: Holiday days are not unemployment days and must be indicated as such on the card.
oublier-vacances.advice: For each leave day, choose the « Holidays » situation rather than leaving the default situation.

ignorer-autre-situation.title: Not taking « other situation » days into account
ignorer-autre-situation.explanation: Some days without performance (public holiday, paid training, etc.) are not unemployment and fall under another situation.
ignorer-autre-situation.advice: When a day is covered other than by unemployment, choose « Other situation » for that day.

pas-remplir-premier-jour-effectif.title: Not filling in from the first effective unemployment day
pas-remplir-premier-jour-effectif.explanation: When the temporary unemployment begins during the month, the card is filled in from the first effective unemployment day, not from the 1st of the month.
pas-remplir-premier-jour-effectif.advice: Identify the first effective unemployment day and fill in the card from that day to the end of the month.

ignorer-regle-cp124.title: Not taking into account the JC 124 construction rule
ignorer-regle-cp124.explanation: In the construction sector (JC 124), the card must always be filled in for the employer concerned.
ignorer-regle-cp124.advice: If you fall under JC 124, systematically fill in your control card, without exception.

pas-informer-organisme-autre-employeur.title: Not informing the payment institution in case of another regular employer
pas-informer-organisme-autre-employeur.explanation: If you combine several regular jobs, the other occupation must be communicated to your payment institution.
pas-informer-organisme-autre-employeur.advice: Report all your regular occupations to your payment institution to avoid any misunderstanding.

0.a: The eC3.2 is the electronic control card for temporary unemployment. It allows you to fill in and send your control card electronically, without a paper version.

1.q: Is it the same as the eC3?
1.a: No. The eC3.2 concerns temporary unemployment, while the eC3 concerns full unemployment. They are two distinct control cards.

2.q: Can this Docbel page be used to send a real card?
2.a: No. It is an educational simulation: no real data is sent and nothing is transmitted to the NEO. The simulator is only intended for understanding and practising.

3.q: Where is the real eC3.2 application?
3.a: The real application is accessible via the social security portal or via the « eC3.2 Temporary unemployment » mobile application.

4.q: How do I log in to the real application?
4.a: Login is done with a secure identification method: eID, itsme, security code (by email or via the mobile application) or a recognised European identification method.

5.q: What do I do if I am a cross-border worker?
5.a: With a national register number or a BIS number, you can use a European electronic identification method. Failing this, an alternative digital key may be necessary.

6.q: Do I have to be affiliated with a payment institution?
6.a: Yes. To receive benefits and to send the card, you must be affiliated with a payment institution: HVW/CAPAC, ACV/CSC, ABVV/FGTB or SYNOVA.

7.q: Can I fill in the card without a payment institution?
7.a: Yes, you can fill in the card, but it cannot be submitted as long as your affiliation with a payment institution has not been completed.

8.a: Choose the employer who placed you on temporary unemployment. If several employers placed you on temporary unemployment, a separate card must be filled in for each employer concerned.

9.q: What do I do if I have several employers?
9.a: You must inform your payment institution of all your occupations. In case of temporary unemployment at several employers, a card must be filled in for each employer concerned.

10.q: What do I have to do if I work during a temporary unemployment period?
10.a: You must indicate the work on the card before starting to work, not after.

11.q: What do I have to indicate if I am sick?
11.a: Indicate « Work incapacity » for the days concerned, including weekends and public holidays if they are covered. Also remember to inform your health insurance fund within 48 hours.

12.q: What do I have to indicate if I take holidays?
12.a: Indicate « Holidays » for the days concerned.

13.a: This category covers, for example, public holidays, compensatory rest, paid training, unpaid leave, unjustified absences, detention, paternity leave or certain extra-legal leave.

14.a: Yes, as long as the card has not been submitted. An explanation may be requested to justify the correction.

15.q: Is the NEO informed of corrections?
15.a: In the real application, the NEO is informed of modifications made to the card.

16.q: When can I send my card?
16.a: You can send it from the first possible submission date. Even if this date falls before the end of the month, fill in the card correctly until the last day of the month.

17.a: In the real application, the card is sent to your payment institution. In the Docbel simulation, no real sending takes place.

18.a: The webinar mentions a permanent derogation for JC 327. This information still has to be checked and updated before the final publication.

19.q: Do employers still have to provide a paper card?
19.a: Since the eC3.2 obligation, there is in principle no longer a paper card, except in case of an applicable derogation.

scenarioPresets.all-month: By default, the whole month is already considered as « Unemployment ». You have nothing to change: proceed to verification.
scenarioPresets.work-own: Select the days worked, then choose « Work at the employer ».
scenarioPresets.work-elsewhere-usual: Select the day, then choose « Work elsewhere — a day normally worked ». All work must be recorded before starting.
scenarioPresets.work-elsewhere-weekend: Select Saturday and Sunday, then choose « Work elsewhere — a normally non-worked day ».
scenarioPresets.other-regular: Select the day, then choose « Work at another regular employer ».
scenarioPresets.sick: Select the sickness days and choose « Work incapacity ».
scenarioPresets.vacation: Select the holiday days and choose « Holidays ».
scenarioPresets.other-situation: 1 May is a public holiday: select it and choose « Other situation ».
scenarioPresets.multiple-employers: With several employers, choose the one who placed you on temporary unemployment; your other occupations are indicated on this card.
scenarioPresets.no-payment-org: Try to send the card: submission is blocked as long as you are not affiliated with a payment institution.
scenarioPresets.correction: On an unsubmitted card, open a day already entered to correct it: an explanation is required.
scenarioPresets.construction-cp124: In construction (JC 124), the card must always be filled in, even when you work.
scenarioPresets.first-effective-day: Spot the automatic icon of the first effective unemployment day (5 May): it is never entered manually.
scenarioPresets.wrong-month: Check the month before filling in: here, it is the April 2025 card that has to be filled in.
